scripts.start: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix frontend" ".\.venv\Scripts\python.exe -m uvicorn app:app --reload --port 8000 --app-dir backend"
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix frontend" ".\.venv\Scripts\python.exe -m uvicorn app:app --reload --port 8000 --app-dir backend"
scripts.build: npm install && npm install --prefix frontend && npm run build --prefix frontend
